docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FULLER, RICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NOLAN, PATRICK JAMES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
